creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pav         2010-08-13 14:02:57 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    vietnamese           Makefile 
  Added files:
    vietnamese/x-unikey  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  UniKey is a very small and easy-to-use Vietnamese keyboard for Windows.
  
  X-Unikey is Unikey ported to Linux and FreeBSD. X-Unikey lets you type
  Vietnamese in X Window environment.
  
  WWW: http://www.unikey.org/linux.php
  
  PR:             ports/148389
  Submitted by:   Alexander Yerenkow <yerenkow@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.26      +1 -0      ports/vietnamese/Makefile
  1.1       +23 -0     ports/vietnamese/x-unikey/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/vietnamese/x-unikey/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/vietnamese/x-unikey/pkg-descr (new)
